title: feat: Add configurable external links to sidebar via Helm values
author: Rohith-Saran

findings.description: Commit title uses Conventional Commits style (feat:) instead of project format (area: SubArea: Description). Hard blocker — maintainer will request changes.
externalLinks not added to Helm values JSON schema under config properties. Schema is incomplete for IDE auto-complete and CI linting.
On Unmarshal failure, externalLinks remains nil (marshals to JSON null). Assign []ExternalLink{} after logging error so client always receives an array.
Verify HEADLAMP_CONFIG_EXTERNAL_LINKS env var name matches koanf's env-to-key mapping for the external-links koanf key.
safeLinkUrl validates URLs to ^https?:// preventing javascript:/data: injection.
Existing target=_blank rel=noopener noreferrer handling in ListItemLink correctly renders external links.
Redux configSlice test covers setConfig with externalLinks; backend test exercises JSON round-trip.
icon: link.icon || 'mdi:link' provides sensible default icon when none specified.
